results.description: The Thurston County Sheriff's Office is investigating the apparent homicide of a 49-year-old Olympia man on Friday, July 3. A suspect, a 29-year-old Olympia man, died following a medical ...

results.title: Lusby Man Arrested At Work, Held Without Bond On Child Sexual Exploitation Charges
results.description: HAVRE DE GRACE, Md. — Investigators from the Maryland State Police Child Exploitation Unit charged a Calvert County man with multiple counts of sexual exploitation of a minor. The accused is identified as Jurel Daquone Leo Bowman, 32, of Lusby, Maryland. He is charged with six counts of sexual solicitation of a minor. He was [...] The post Lusby Man Arrested At Work, Held Without Bond On Child Sexual Exploitation Charges appeared first on The BayNet .

results.title: Forney fireworks stand makes most of America's 250th on hot Fourth of July
results.description: A fireworks stand at a food truck park in Forney sells steadily ahead of the Fourth of July and the 250th anniversary of U.S. independence.

results.title: Paul Pelosi Facing Possible Charges After Alleged Hit-And-Run In Napa County
results.description: Paul Pelosi, husband of Rep. Nancy Pelosi, may face hit-and-run charges following an incident in Napa County on Friday afternoon. Napa County Sheriff’s Deputies allege Pelosi crashed into a parked car, briefly stopped, then drove away.

results.title: On the Armenian Genocide and the Israeli government's borderline statecraft
results.description: The Armenians deserved this recognition a century ago. They receive it now not because historical truth finally prevailed, but because it briefly became politically expedient: one more truth spoken as a lie by the reckless government of Benjamin Netanyahu

results.title: Wimbledon 2026 Results: Alexandra Eala Stuns Iga Swiatek, Elena Rybakina Crashes Out In Massive Upsets
results.description: Wimbledon 2026 witnessed major upsets as Alexandra Eala stunned defending champion Iga Swiatek and Elise Mertens knocked out Elena Rybakina. Madison Keys advanced, Serena Williams withdrew from doubles, while Alexander Zverev, Flavio Cobolli, Alex de Minaur and Arthur Fery progressed.

results.title: 100 authors demand $75M from Anthropic over ‘stolen’ work to train its systems: lawsuit
results.description: Over 100 fed-up authors are demanding over $75 million from a San Francisco-based AI company Anthropic that allegedly stole their books to train its systems.
